name: frontend-taste-engineer
description: Source-backed frontend intelligence for planning, building, auditing, refining, and verifying production web interfaces.

interface.shortDescription: Build and audit exceptional production interfaces
interface.longDescription: A source-backed frontend operating system that combines a compact Codex Skill, hybrid MCP retrieval, deterministic audits, explicit completion gates, and maintainable research provenance. It balances product fit, visual distinction, accessibility, responsive behavior, performance, content integrity, and honest functionality.
defaultPrompt: Design and build a distinctive, production-ready landing page for this product.
Audit this frontend and fix its highest-impact usability and design problems.
Rebuild this screenshot responsively while preserving accessibility.
